goal: Add a repeatable production real backend load step runner for the public Work/Study API mix before selecting the next heavy-detail optimization.

requirements.realPublicMix: satisfied by four Work/Study public API targets
requirements.pageSize12: satisfied by default and hard fail for any other LIST_PAGE_SIZE
requirements.noSeedShortcut: satisfied by requiring WORK_READ_PATH and STUDY_READ_PATH
requirements.observability: satisfied by latency, failure, payload, receive, app/nginx timing, dropped iteration, and optional DB diagnostics summaries
requirements.nextPlanInput: satisfied by cleanCeilingRps, firstSaturationRate, and nextFocus aggregate fields

validations.notes: failed before implementation because script was missing; passed after implementation

validations.command: for script in scripts/prod-real-load-steps.sh scripts/prod-runtime-preflight.sh scripts/promote-main-runtime.sh scripts/ci-compose-smoke.sh; do bash -n "$script"; done
git diff --check -- scripts/prod-real-load-steps.sh src/test/prod-real-load-steps.test.ts scripts/main-runtime-allowlist.txt todolist-2026-05-10.md

localLoadTest.reason: requires production server context, real current public read targets, k6 runtime, and optional admin cookie

risks: Production timing headers must be present before interpreting results
Aggregate nextFocus is a heuristic and must be reviewed with raw per-step summaries
Actual bottleneck decision remains pending until the runner is executed against production
operatorCommand: BASE_URL=https://woonglab.com WORK_READ_PATH=/api/public/works/<real-work-slug> STUDY_READ_PATH=/api/public/blogs/<real-study-slug> RATES="200 300 400 500" DURATION_SECONDS=30 MAX_VUS=500 PRE_ALLOCATED_VUS=100 ADMIN_COOKIE_FILE=/tmp/admin.cookies ./scripts/prod-real-load-steps.sh
recommendation: Ship through dev CI, promote to main, run production runtime preflight, then run the step runner and choose the next heavy-detail code optimization from the generated aggregate.
